ddls:
CREATE TABLE "papers" (
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each paper */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the paper */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the paper */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for search indexing */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier */,
  "citation_chicago" TEXT /* Citation in Chicago style */,
  "citations" INTEGER /* Number of citations the paper has received */,
  "link" TEXT /* Link to the paper */,
  "published_year" INTEGER /* Year the paper was published */,
  "published_month" INTEGER /* Month the paper was published */,
  "location_study" TEXT /* Location where the study was conducted */,
  "gps_lat" REAL /* Latitude of the study location */,
  "gps_long" REAL /* Longitude of the study location */,
  "months_lapsed" INTEGER /* Number of months since the study was published */,
  "radius" REAL /* Radius of the study area */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the paper */,
  "field_of_study" TEXT /* Field of study */,
  "color_code_id" INTEGER /* Reference to color code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("paper_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_papers_location_study FOREIGN KEY ("location_study") REFERENCES locations ("location_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_papers_color_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("color_code_id") REFERENCES color_codes ("color_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the location */,
  "gps_lat" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "gps_long" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "radius" REAL /* Radius of the study area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* Open Researcher and Contributor ID */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the author */,
  "profile_link" TEXT /* Link to the author's professional profile */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "paper_authors" (
  "paper_author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each paper-author relationship */,
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* ID of the paper */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order of the author in the paper */,
  "contribution" TEXT /* Description of the author's contribution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("paper_author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_paper_authors_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_paper_authors_paper_id FOREIGN KEY ("paper_id") REFERENCES papers ("paper_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "journals" (
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each journal */,
  "journal_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal */,
  "issn" TEXT /* ISSN of the journal */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the journal */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journal */,
  "field_of_study" TEXT /* Field of study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "paper_journals" (
  "paper_journal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each paper-journal relationship */,
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* ID of the paper */,
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the journal */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Volume of the journal */,
  "issue" TEXT /* Issue of the journal */,
  "pages" TEXT /* Pages of the paper in the journal */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier of the paper in the journal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("paper_journal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_paper_journals_paper_id FOREIGN KEY ("paper_id") REFERENCES papers ("paper_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_paper_journals_journal_id FOREIGN KEY ("journal_id") REFERENCES journals ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Affiliated institution */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* ID of the paper being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the paper */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the paper was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_paper_id FOREIGN KEY ("paper_id") REFERENCES papers ("paper_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citations" (
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation */,
  "cited_paper_id" INTEGER /* ID of the paper being cited */,
  "citing_paper_id" INTEGER /* ID of the paper citing the paper */,
  "citation_date" TEXT /* Date when the citation was recorded */,
  "context" TEXT /* Context or excerpt of the citation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_cited_paper_id FOREIGN KEY ("cited_paper_id") REFERENCES papers ("paper_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_citing_paper_id FOREIGN KEY ("citing_paper_id") REFERENCES papers ("paper_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "paper_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* ID of the paper */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was published */,
  "version_link" TEXT /* Link to the version */,
  "changes_summary" TEXT /* Summary of changes from the previous version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_paper_versions_paper_id FOREIGN KEY ("paper_id") REFERENCES papers ("paper_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "color_codes" (
  "color_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color code */,
  "color_name" TEXT /* Name of the color */,
  "hex_code" TEXT /* Hexadecimal code of the color */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("color_code_id")
)
column_names: Number of citations the paper has received
